title: A Stop on the Yakima River
summary: After leaving Vancouver, we stopped in the town of Cascade Locks to hike up Dry Creek Falls. It was a great stop to stretch the legs and see some beautiful falls. After our hike, we made our way to the Yakima River, where our friend Abby had recommended a nice campsite. We found a great spot right along the river and used the leftovers from our hotpot meal in Vancouver to make a tasty soup for dinner.

photos.caption: Dry Creek Falls outside Cascade Locks, OR
